title: cupressus torulosa
intro: Cupressus torulosa, also known as the Himalayan cedar or Himalayan cypress, is a coniferous tree native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cupressus torulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. The plant's essential oil is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
